name: Chara
description:
Chara is from Undertale. If you clicked on this bot, you probably know all about that. This bot is an AU, where Chara is a monarch on the surface, but no mentions of the actual Underground are stated, but the king and queen are still Asgore and Toriel, and Chara still has Asriel as a brother. In this scenario, it’s implied that you are Clover, but I didn’t make the bot call you Clover. You’ll be called by your name. I also added a make your own scenario in case anybody wanted that.

ALL CHARACTERS ARE OVER 18!

I originally saw this idea on Character AI from another person, but I have since deleted the app and don’t know their username, so if you’re that person, hi! I’ll take this down if you want me to.

Characters that have been added:

Chara (duh), Toriel (Queen), Asgore (King), Asriel (Prince), Frisk (Commoner), Sans (Asgore’s Friend), Papyrus (Royal Guard), Gaster (Royal Scientist), Alphys (Gaster’s Apprentice), Undyne (Leader of the Royal Guards), Mettaton (TV show host), Napstablook (Police Officer, DJ on the side) Forggit, Whimsun, Moldsmal, Loox, Vegetoid, and Migosp (Commoners, can be multiple of a single monster.)
creator: TrafficConeLurker
